# Solidping
This service provides a platform for monitoring and managing the health of various systems and services. It offers a range of features including real-time monitoring, alerting, and reporting capabilities.

It's open-source, can be deployed on-premises or in the cloud and has a SaaS offering.

## Features
- Real-time monitoring
- Alerting on email, slack


## Register
To register you can use the following command:

```
curl \
  https://solidping.com/api/v1/register -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"email": "user@example.com", "password": "password"}'
```

Then you'll have to verify your email address by clicking on the link sent to your email.

You can also register using the web interface at https://solidping.com/register with a google, github, azure, azure account.

## Adding a check
### http check
```bash
curl \
  https://solidping.com/api/v1/org/$org/checks -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"type": "http","config":{"url": "https://example.com"}}'
```

### ICMP check
```bash
curl \
  https://solidping.com/api/v1/org/$org/checks -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"type": "icmp","config":{"url": "icmp://example.com"}}'
```

## Listing checks
```bash
curl \
  https://solidping.com/api/v1/org/$org/checks -X GET -H "Content-Type: application/json"
```
